arts.ttl: ‘He’s not that kind of player’: Ian Wright says Liverpool have a player who’s nothing like Pierre-Emerick Aubameyang
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah isn’t getting his way at Liverpool right now. Salah is performing brilliantly on the pitch, but, for some reason, Liverpool still won’t offer...

arts.ttl: Arne Slot faces Brendan Rodgers Liverpool dilemma after Man City Champions League surrender
arts.sum: Liverpool face Real Madrid in the Champions League on Wednesday before host Manchester City in the Premier League this weekend

arts.ttl: Liverpool vs Real Madrid LIVE: Possible lineups and latest updates
arts.sum: Liverpool vs Real Madrid kicks off at 20:00 local time in England - which makes it a 21:00 CET start for fans back in Spain. Real Madrid are heading to Northern England for an iconic European battle on Champions League Matchday 5, with Anfield and Liverpool set to play hosts to Los Blancos on Wednesday night.

arts.ttl: Liverpool vs Real Madrid LIVE - team news, TV channel, kick-off time, score and commentary stream

arts.sum: Liverpool take on Real Madrid at Anfield tonight in the biggest game of the new-look Champions League group stage so far

arts.ttl: Liverpool v Real Madrid TV channel in Champions League tonight
arts.sum: Liverpool face Real Madrid in the Champions League tonight in poor form

arts.ttl: Real Madrid star speaks out on Liverpool transfer links: ‘The next 10 or 15 years’
arts.sum: Real Madrid star Jude Bellingham has opened up on the speculation, past and present, linking him with a move to Premier League giants Liverpool. Bellingham is for his part currently…

arts.ttl: Why Mbappe needs time to shine at Real Madrid
arts.sum: Real Madrid fan Leah Revelle and European football expert Julien Laurens tell The Football News Show why Kylian Mbappe has been the victim of his own success.

arts.ttl: Liverpool have a chance to make a statement when they play host to Real Madrid - as Arne Slot's side look to get one over on their European bogey team
arts.sum: Real have triumphed in seven of the last eight meetings, with a 0-0 draw in April 2021 marking the only time Liverpool have managed to avoid defeat in the last 15 years.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid vs Liverpool Lineups, Projected Starting XIs for Champions League Clash
arts.sum: Los Blancos travel to Anfield to take on The Reds in a massive continental showdown on Wednesday.

arts.ttl: Why isn’t Vinicius Jr playing for Real Madrid against Liverpool today in the Champions League?
arts.sum: The game between Liverpool - Real Madrid will be played on Wednesday November 27 at Anfield, with kick off at 3:00 p.m. ET / 12:00 p.m. PT . “ It’s in Mbappé‘s hands", “Anfield needs the best Mbappé" and “Mbappé can ignite the debate" all shout at him to do something the oldies will remember he used to: score goals for Real Madrid.
